steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The colon introduces the explanation: 'what drives firms in certain industries to cluster may not be especially relevant among other industries.' The blank must describe clustering factors that differ depending on the industry.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘unknown’: The passage identifies specific factors; the problem is not that they're unknown but that they differ across industries. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘variable’: Means differing by circumstance, which directly matches the colon's explanation that different industries are driven by different factors. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘focused’: Contradicts the passage's point that factors are not uniform. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘impressive’: The passage describes factors that vary by industry, not factors that are especially striking or admirable. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
